zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bird於1510年出生在英國奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福時，她的父親Thomas Bird24歲，母親Betty18歲。她和Alexander Tredwell至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1545年9月3日在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 阿布其 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯 龐特尼享年35歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Bird
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Kingbird
meanings: Native American (Chippewa; also King Bird): translation into English of the Chippewa personal name Ogimaa-bines(i), meaning literally ‘the bird that is king’ and referring to the mythological bird-like creature thunderbird. See also Bird 4.
History: The progenitor of the large family of the Kingbirds from the Red Lake, MN, was Ogimaa-bines, a musical gifted Chippewa spiritual leader.

variants.name: Byrd
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bird  .

variants.name: Heaney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Malachy, Nuala, Ronan.
Irish:

Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÉanna and Ó hÉinne, ‘descendant of Éanna’, a very common personal name of uncertain meaning. It was borne by various early Christian saints, most notably Saint Éanna of Aran. The name has been erroneously understood as containing the element éan ‘bird’ and as a result the surname was sometimes Anglicized as Bird .

variants.name: Blackbird
meanings: Native American (also Black Bird): translation into English of a personal name such as Lakota Sioux Ziŋtkala Sapa, which is composed of ziŋtkala ‘bird’ and sapa ‘black’. See also Bird 4.
English (Durham): nickname for someone with a dark beard, from Middle English blak ‘black’ + berd ‘beard’ (Old English blæc + beard).

variants.name: Burd
meanings: English: variant of   Bird  .
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): nickname for a man with a notable beard, from a southern Yiddish pronunciation of Yiddish bord ‘beard’.

variants.name: Burt
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Hummingbird
meanings: Native American (Cherokee): translation into English of a personal name based on the Cherokee name walela for a hummingbird. See also Bird 4.

variants.name: Heagney
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÉignigh, ‘descendant of Éigneach’, a personal name meaning ‘forceful’. The spelling of the Irish name was often simplified to Ó hÉinigh and then Anglicized as Heaney or ‘translated’ as Bird , the latter because of a perceived similarity to éan ‘bird’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bird was born in 1510, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Bird, was 24 and her mother, Betty, was 18. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Alexander Tredwell. She died on 3 September 1545, in London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, Middlesex, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in London, England.

Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Alexander Tredwell. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1545, à London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

ko.London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 압c후르치 위스 스트 로렌스 파우트니
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bird(이)가 1510년 영국 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bird(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Betty(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Alexander Tredwell(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 9월 3일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 압c후르치 위스 스트 로렌스 파우트니에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bird nasceu em 1510, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bird, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Betty, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Alexander Tredwell. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1545, em London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence Pountney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Mary Abchurch with St Lawrence: лондон ст мэри абчурч вит ст ларенс поунтни, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bird родилась в 1510 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bird было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Betty, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Alexander Tredwell. Она умерла 3 сентября 1545 г. в местности лондон ст мэри абчурч вит ст ларенс поунтни, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.
